title: Graph Studio
description: Force-directed graph explorer — build networks, switch layouts, export SVG, and save/load graphs from localStorage.
concept: A full-featured interactive graph editor with 5 layout algorithms (force-directed, circular, radial, grid, spectral), node/edge creation, property editing, and physics simulation. Built as a genuine mini-app: double-click to pin nodes, drag to reposition, use keyboard shortcuts for modes, and export the entire graph as a clean SVG file.
features: Force-directed physics simulation with tunable charge, link distance, and gravity
5 layout algorithms: Force-Directed, Circular, Radial Tree, Grid, Spectral
5 preset graphs: Social Network, Org Chart, Concept Map, Mesh Topology, Star
Node property editor: custom labels, 8 colors, size slider
Edge drawing mode and delete mode with keyboard shortcuts
Pan/zoom with mouse wheel and touch gestures
Save/load complete graph state to localStorage

interaction.mouse: Pan canvas by dragging empty space; drag nodes to reposition
interaction.click: Add nodes (node mode), delete items (delete mode), select for properties
interaction.touch: Touch drag for pan and node move; touch swipe supported
interaction.keyboard: s=select, n=node, e=edge, d=delete, space=toggle sim, p=pin, Del=delete selected
